headlines.text: Vance flies to Islamabad for high-stakes US-Iran peace talks as ceasefire frays
Israel kills 300+ in Lebanon 'Black Wednesday' strikes, threatening to blow up Iran deal
Iran parliament speaker warns 'time is running out' ahead of Pakistan negotiations
March CPI surges to 3.3% — biggest monthly gain since 2022 — as Iran war torches energy prices
House GOP gavels Democrats silent on Iran War Powers vote during pro forma session
Stocks rise for 8th straight day; Dow turned positive for 2026 on ceasefire hopes
National gas average hits $4.17/gal — first time above $4 since 2022, thanks Iran
UK bans Kanye West, cancels entire Wireless Festival rather than replace him
Melania Trump denies Epstein ties in surprise White House appearance
TSMC posts 35% Q1 revenue surge on AI chip demand, shares up in premarket

breaking.text: JD Vance departs for Islamabad — US-Iran direct talks begin Saturday

stories.hed: Vance Boards Air Force Two for Islamabad as Israel Bombs Lebanon and the Ceasefire Groans Audibly
stories.dek: JD Vance left for Pakistan this morning to lead US-Iran negotiations, joining Witkoff and Jared Kushner — the same duo whose previous Geneva talks were torpedoed when the US started bombing Iran mid-session. Iran's parliament speaker says the ceasefire has already been violated and time is running out, while Netanyahu insists Lebanon is not covered by any deal and is continuing airstrikes there anyway. Trump told NBC he is 'very optimistic,' which is either reassuring or a red flag depending on your risk tolerance.

stories.hed: UK Bans Kanye West, Cancels Entire Wireless Festival Rather Than Just Find a New Headliner
stories.dek: Britain's Home Office revoked Ye's Electronic Travel Authorization, stating his presence 'would not be conducive to the public good,' and the entire three-day London festival was scrapped rather than book a replacement. PM Keir Starmer said West 'should never have been invited' — a sentiment that apparently also applies to whoever signed the initial contract.

stories.hed: GOP Speaker Pro Tempore Gavels Democrats Silent the Moment They Tried to Force an Iran War Powers Vote
stories.dek: With most of Congress on recess, Maryland Democrat Glenn Ivey attempted to pass an Iran war powers resolution by unanimous consent during a pro forma session. Republican Speaker Pro Tempore Chris Smith gaveled the chamber adjourned approximately one sentence into Ivey's remarks, adjourning until April 13. Democracy: working exactly as designed.

stories.hed: March CPI Hits 3.3% as Iran War Sends Gas Past $4 for First Time Since 2022
stories.dek: Consumer prices accelerated sharply from February's 2.6% rate as the US-Iran war sent energy costs skyrocketing, and the Federal Reserve now faces a classic stagflation headache. Stocks opened higher anyway because at this point markets have simply dissociated.

stories.hed: Melania Trump Surfaced at the White House to Deny Knowing Epstein — While the White House Declined to Comment on the Timing
stories.dek: In a rare public appearance, First Lady Melania Trump denied past ties to Jeffrey Epstein and said he did not introduce her to Donald Trump. The White House separately declined to comment on why this statement dropped when it did, which is its own kind of comment.

markets.context: Markets extended their 8-day rally on ceasefire hopes and in-line CPI data, while oil crept back up as the Strait of Hormuz remained effectively blocked and investors awaited Saturday's Islamabad talks.

gas.note: Congrats: your commute now costs more than your lunch, and lunch isn't cheap either.

popCulture.hed: UK Bans Kanye West From the Country Entirely, Canceling Wireless Festival and Delivering the Most Decisive Music Industry Verdict of 2026
popCulture.dek: The UK Home Office pulled Ye's travel authorization, citing the public good — forcing the entire three-day festival to cancel rather than find a replacement, with full refunds going out to 150,000 ticket holders. It is the first time a music festival has been nuked not by rain, logistics, or a headliner's demands, but by an actual government ban.

genZ.definition: A TikTok format set to Ella Langley's track where creators lipsync to camera with text overlays about cutting out negativity and returning to things that actually make them happy — it's the post-winter exhale set to music, and it is everywhere on the For You Page this week. Think: less 'girl dinner,' more 'girl renaissance.'
genZ.usage: POV: you find out Vance is negotiating Iran peace so you don't have to pay $5 a gallon anymore. And just like that, I'm back to loving life again.

tldr: Day 42 of the Iran war: JD Vance flew to Pakistan for make-or-break nuclear negotiations while Israel kept bombing Lebanon and Iran's parliament speaker said the ceasefire was already broken before talks even started. On the home front, gas hit $4.17 a gallon, inflation jumped to 3.3%, and the UK banned Kanye West from the entire country — a rare Friday where the international crisis and the music news felt equally chaotic.
